requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — TGSB Conformity, PURA/NAWEC Projects, and Donor Procurement
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——TGSB合格评定、PURA/NAWEC项目及捐助方采购
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——TGSB合格評定、PURA/NAWEC項目及捐助方採購

summary.en: The conservative safety baseline for PV inverters supplied into The Gambia is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or model family. TGSB is The Gambia's national standards body, established by the TGSB Act, and its public materials describe powers related to standards marks, inspection, and conformity. PURA regulates electricity and renewable energy, while NAWEC is the practical utility counterparty for grid-connected projects. Public sources do not confirm a single Gambia solar-inverter mandatory standard list, so exporters should treat IEC 62109-1/-2, product labelling, installation instructions, environmental ratings, and project-owner safety specifications as baseline evidence until TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, or the procuring entity confirms the exact route.
summary.zh: 供应冈比亚的光伏逆变器，保守安全基线是针对具体逆变器型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据。TGSB是冈比亚国家标准机构，依据TGSB法成立，其公开材料描述了标准标志、检查和合格评定相关职权。PURA监管电力和可再生能源，NAWEC则是并网项目的实际公用事业对接方。公开来源未确认单一的冈比亚太阳能逆变器强制标准清单，因此出口商应将IEC 62109-1/-2、产品标签、安装说明、环境额定值和项目业主安全规格作为基线证据，直至TGSB、PURA、NAWEC或采购实体确认具体路径。
summary.zht: 供應甘比亞的光伏逆變器，保守安全基線是針對具體逆變器型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據。TGSB是甘比亞國家標準機構，依據TGSB法成立，其公開材料描述了標準標誌、檢查和合格評定相關職權。PURA監管電力和再生能源，NAWEC則是併網項目的實際公用事業對接方。公開來源未確認單一的甘比亞太陽能逆變器強制標準清單，因此出口商應將IEC 62109-1/-2、產品標籤、安裝說明、環境額定值和項目業主安全規格作為基線證據，直至TGSB、PURA、NAWEC或採購實體確認具體路徑。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
TGSB Act and TGSB standards-mark, inspection, and conformity context
PURA electricity and renewable-energy regulation context
NAWEC utility connection and project acceptance context

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter suppliers commonly provide GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, CNAS laboratory reports, factory quality documents, and domestic installation manuals. These documents may overlap conceptually with IEC 62109 safety topics, but they are not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports unless the report explicitly covers IEC 62109 clauses, model variants, ratings, environmental category, and critical components.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器供应商通常提供GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC或CGC自愿认证、CNAS实验室报告、工厂质量文件和国内安装手册。这些文件可能与IEC 62109安全主题在概念上有重叠，但除非报告明确覆盖IEC 62109条款、型号变体、额定值、环境类别和关键元器件，否则不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器供應商通常提供GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC或CGC自願認證、CNAS實驗室報告、工廠品質文件和國內安裝手冊。這些文件可能與IEC 62109安全主題在概念上有重疊，但除非報告明確覆蓋IEC 62109條款、型號變體、額定值、環境類別和關鍵元器件，否則不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification routes where available

gap.en: Gap: A China domestic safety or performance certificate does not prove that the product meets IEC 62109-1/-2 for a Gambia project. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 reports, certificate schedules, critical-component lists, English manuals, warning labels, installation clearances, IP and corrosion evidence, surge-protection design, thermal derating curves, and service instructions. For coastal or high-humidity sites, confirm conformal coating, enclosure materials, connector ratings, and warranty assumptions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内安全或性能证书不能证明产品满足冈比亚项目的IEC 62109-1/-2要求。应准备IEC 62109-1/-2报告、证书附表、关键元器件清单、英文说明书、警示标签、安装间距、防护等级和防腐证据、浪涌保护设计、热降额曲线和服务说明。对于沿海或高湿场址，应确认三防漆、外壳材料、连接器额定值和保修假设。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內安全或性能證書不能證明產品滿足甘比亞項目的IEC 62109-1/-2要求。應準備IEC 62109-1/-2報告、證書附表、關鍵元器件清單、英文說明書、警示標籤、安裝間距、防護等級和防腐證據、浪湧保護設計、熱降額曲線和服務說明。對於沿海或高濕場址，應確認三防漆、外殼材料、連接器額定值和保固假設。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but conservative baseline for TGSB conformity review, PURA/NAWEC grid projects, utility-scale procurement, and donor/lender specifications; exact mandatory status should be confirmed with the responsible body
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-dependent for many Chinese PV inverter certificates; not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence for Gambia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence as the baseline safety package for Gambia PV inverter projects, then confirm the exact route with TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, and the project owner. Do not treat GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC, CGC, or CNAS domestic documentation as automatically equivalent unless the report explicitly covers the IEC 62109 model family and ratings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 冈比亚光伏逆变器项目应以IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据作为基线安全包，然后与TGSB、PURA、NAWEC和项目业主确认具体路径。除非报告明确覆盖IEC 62109型号系列和额定值，否则不要将GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC、CGC或CNAS国内文件视为自动等效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 甘比亞光伏逆變器項目應以IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據作為基線安全包，然後與TGSB、PURA、NAWEC和項目業主確認具體路徑。除非報告明確覆蓋IEC 62109型號系列和額定值，否則不要將GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC、CGC或CNAS國內文件視為自動等效。
